import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext'; import './Home.css'; export default function Home() { const { isLoggedIn, isAdmin } = useAuth(); return (
{/* Hero */}
BookNest Platform

Discover Stories
That Move You

A curated bookstore platform for readers and administrators. Browse our catalog, manage books, and explore a world of knowledge.

Browse Catalog → {!isLoggedIn() && ( Create Account )} {isLoggedIn() && ( {isAdmin() ? 'Admin Panel' : 'My Dashboard'} )}
{/* Features */}

{f.icon}

{f.title}

{f.desc}

))}
{/* CTA */} {!isLoggedIn() && (

Ready to get started?

Join BookNest and explore our growing catalog of books.

Register Now Sign In
)} {/* Footer */}
📚 BookNest

Discover. Read. Belong. © 2026 BookNest Platform

); } const FEATURES = [ { icon: '📖', title: 'Rich Catalog', desc: 'Browse books by category, author, or title with a clean and fast interface.' }, { icon: '🔐', title: 'Secure Auth', desc: 'JWT-based authentication with OTP verification and role-based access control.' }, { icon: '🛡️', title: 'Role Access', desc: 'Admins manage the full catalog while customers browse and view details.' }, { icon: '⚡', title: 'Microservices', desc: 'Built on Spring Boot microservices with API Gateway and Eureka service discovery.' }, ];
